name: How is fault decided in work forklift accident for extra money?
description: Negligence elements for third-party; comp no-fault.[3]

mainEntity.name: How is fault decided in work forklift accident for extra money?

acceptedAnswer.text: Negligence elements for third-party; comp no-fault.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Prove duty, breach, causation, damages for third-party; comp ignores fault.** Utah modified comparative: recover if <50% your fault.[3] Key factors: Evidence like training records, OSHA violations, witnesses.[4] Expert reconstructs scene.
